yaml:
workflow:
  id: lead-enrichment
  name: Sales Lead Enrichment
  description: |
    Iterates a CSV of new leads, enriches each from Clearbit + LinkedIn,
    scores them, and pushes the top tier into Salesforce.
  version: "2.0.1"
  variables:
    - name: csv_uri
      type: string
      description: S3 URI for the inbound CSV the trigger dropped.
    - name: score_threshold
      type: number
      default: 75

  steps:
    - id: auth
      kind: import
      source: auth-common
      description: Reuse the org-wide OAuth + permissions sub-Vibe.
      with:
        scopes:
          - clearbit:read
          - salesforce:write
          - linkedin:read

    - id: load_csv
      function: apiRequest
      description: Pull the CSV out of S3 and parse rows.
      input:
        endpoint: $csv_uri
        parser: csv
      output: leads

    - id: process_each_lead
      kind: for_each
      iterable: $leads
      item: lead
      index: i
      body:
        - id: clearbit_lookup
          function: apiRequest
          input:
            endpoint: https://person.clearbit.com/v2/people/find
            query:
              email: $lead.email
          output: clearbit_profile
          on_error_step_id: clearbit_fallback

        - id: linkedin_lookup
          function: apiRequest
          input:
            endpoint: /linkedin/profile
            query:
              email: $lead.email
          output: linkedin_profile

        - id: score_lead
          function: llmCall
          description: Score 0-100 based on company size, role seniority, intent signals.
          input:
            model: claude-sonnet-4
            system: You are a sales lead scorer. Return a JSON object with `score` (0-100) and `reason`.
            user:
              clearbit: $clearbit_profile
              linkedin: $linkedin_profile
              raw_lead: $lead
          output: scoring

        - id: above_threshold
          kind: if
          condition: $scoring.score
          then:
            - id: create_sfdc_lead
              function: apiRequest
              input:
                endpoint: /services/data/v60.0/sobjects/Lead
                method: POST
                body:
                  Email: $lead.email
                  FirstName: $lead.first_name
                  LastName: $lead.last_name
                  Company: $clearbit_profile.employment.name
                  Lead_Score__c: $scoring.score
          else:
            - id: tag_nurture
              function: apiRequest
              input:
                endpoint: /marketing/nurture-list
                method: POST
                body:
                  email: $lead.email
                  reason: $scoring.reason

        - id: clearbit_fallback
          function: setVariable
          description: If Clearbit was down, score with whatever we have and continue.
          input:
            clearbit_profile: {}
          output: clearbit_profile
          next_step_id: linkedin_lookup

    - id: summary_report
      function: apiRequest
      description: Post a Slack summary so the SDR team sees the batch result.
      input:
        endpoint: https://hooks.slack.com/services/$slack_webhook
        method: POST
        body:
          text: "Enriched $leads.length leads. Top-tier: see Salesforce."
